title: Group Axioms Verification Flowchart
description: A flowchart to verify if a given mathematical structure (G, *) is a group, based on the four group axioms as presented in Rosen's Discrete Mathematics.
elements: Closure: For all a, b in G, a * b is in G
Associativity: For all a, b, c in G, (a * b) * c = a * (b * c)
Identity: There exists an element e in G such that for every a in G, e * a = a * e = a
Inverse: For each a in G, there exists an element b in G such that a * b = b * a = e
relationships: Sequential verification: Start with Closure, then Associativity, then Identity, and finally Inverse. A 'No' at any step concludes the structure is not a group. Only if all axioms return 'Yes' is (G, *) confirmed as a group.
